# Kathy Clean Houston

> Professional house cleaning services in Houston, TX. Serving Greater Houston including Memorial, Spring Branch, Energy Corridor, Briar Forest, River Oaks, Bellaire, West University Place, Greater Heights, Greater Uptown, Katy, Sugar Land, The Woodlands, Westchase, Oak Forest, and Rice Military. Fully insured, bonded, and background-checked staff. 48-hour satisfaction guarantee on every cleaning.

## Services
- [House Cleaning Services](https://kathycleanhouston.com/house-cleaning-houston): Recurring weekly/biweekly/monthly, deep clean, move-in/move-out, and post-construction cleaning for Houston homes.
- [Commercial Cleaning](https://kathycleanhouston.com/commercial-cleaning-houston): Office and commercial cleaning services in Houston, TX.

## Resources
- [Houston House Cleaning Cost Guide](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/house-cleaning-cost-houston): Pricing ranges ($120–$400/visit), cost factors, and service tiers for Houston area homes.
- [How Often to Schedule House Cleaning in Houston](https://kathycleanhouston.com/resources/how-often-house-cleaning-houston): Frequency recommendations (weekly, biweekly, monthly) based on home size, lifestyle, and Houston climate.

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://kathycleanhouston.com/faq): 20 questions covering insurance, pricing, scheduling, access, cancellation policy, and the 48-hour satisfaction guarantee.

## Service Areas
- [Greater Heights](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greater-heights): ZIP 77007, 77008 — dual-income professionals, highest conversion zone
- [Rice Military](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/rice-military): ZIP 77007 — young professionals, Washington Ave corridor
- [Energy Corridor](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/energy-corridor): ZIP 77079, 77077 — corporate expats, Shell/BP/ConocoPhillips households
- [Katy](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/katy): ZIP 77449, 77450, 77494 — Cinco Ranch, master-planned communities, new construction
- [Sugar Land](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/sugar-land): ZIP 77478, 77479, 77498 — Fort Bend County, First Colony, Riverstone
- [The Woodlands](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/the-woodlands): ZIP 77380–77389 — villages system, corporate relocation, ExxonMobil/Chevron area
- [Spring Branch](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/spring-branch): ZIP 77080 — highest LTV client zone
- [Memorial](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/memorial): ZIP 77024 — Katy Fwy corridor, office location
- [Briar Forest](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/briar-forest)
- [Westchase](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/westchase): ZIP 77042, 77077 — apartments, corporate housing
- [Oak Forest](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/oak-forest): ZIP 77018, 77092
- [River Oaks](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/river-oaks)
- [Bellaire](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/bellaire)
- [West University Place](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/west-university-place)
- [Greater Uptown](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greater-uptown)
- [The Memorial Villages](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/the-memorial-villages)
- [Greenway / Upper Kirby Area](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/greenway-upper-kirby-area)
- [Medical Center Area](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/medical-center-area)
- [Mid West](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/mid-west)
- [Washington Ave. / Memorial Park](https://kathycleanhouston.com/service-areas/washington-ave-memorial-park)
